message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle bold
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8
skinparam classHeaderBorderColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 14
skinparam classFontSize 12
skinparam classFontName Arial
skinparam classFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle normal
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodFontStyle normal
skinparam classMethodFontColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle italic
skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeFontSize 10
skinparam classStereotypeFontName Arial
skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeBorderThickness 1
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRadius 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPadding 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMargin 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSpacing 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderGap 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOffset 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderShift 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSkew 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotate 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScale 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslate 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransform 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMatrix 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPerspective 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOrigin 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderClip 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMask 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderFilter 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderBlend 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderComposite 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOpacity 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderVisibility 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderDisplay 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPosition 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderZIndex 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderFloat 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderClear 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOverflow 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextAlign 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextDecoration 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextTransform 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextIndent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextShadow 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextStroke 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextFill 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextOutline 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextWrap 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextOverflow 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextEllipsis 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextJustify 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextAlignLast 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextIndent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextIndent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextIndent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextIndent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextIndent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextIndent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextIndent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextIndent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextIndent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTextIndent 5

title Modulo-matrícula/Informática

class "Matrícula" as M {
  -id: Int
  -cliente: Client
  -tempo: Int
  -quadra: Turma
  +registraMatrícula(): Int
}

class "Aluno" as A {
  -id: Int
  -nome: String
  -locação: List<Matrícula>
}

class "ControleNúmeroMatrícula" as CNM <<interface>> {
  #quantidadeDeMatrícula: Int
  +registraMatrícula(): Int
}

class "Turma" as T {
  -numero: Int
  -aluguel: Matrícula
  -ginasio: Curso
  +getcontroleNúmeroMatrícula()
}

class "Curso" as C {
  -nome: String
  -profesor: String
  -quadra: List<Turma>
}

M "0..*" --* "1" A : composição
M ..|> CNM : realização
T "1" --* "1..*" M : composição
T ..> CNM : dependência
C "1" --* "1..*" T : composição

note right of M
  <b>composição >
end note

@enduml
